summary: Task 016 is satisfied. All remaining English UI labels on the Sources page editor/modal (Time window, Category, Tags, Active, Save/Add source/Cancel, the Telegram note, and the delete ConfirmModal) were translated to Russian, and the two Sources API routes that surface error text as toasts on that page were translated as well. Changes are string-only swaps inside existing JSX and object literals with no logic, key, or status-code changes. The 9 unrelated API routes from the affected-files list were correctly deferred per the approved plan (option a), so no scope creep. typecheck (npx tsc --noEmit) and build (npm run build) both pass with exit code 0.
